# Manuals
<center>
![](/images/manual.png){style="width:150px; background: white; border-radius:5px"}
</center>

Conda: [https://conda.io/projects/conda/en/latest/user-guide/getting-started.html](https://conda.io/projects/conda/en/latest/user-guide/getting-started.html)

FastQC: [https://www.bioinformatics.babraham.ac.uk/projects/fastqc/](https://www.bioinformatics.babraham.ac.uk/projects/fastqc/)

MultiQC: [https://multiqc.info/](https://multiqc.info/)

Trim Galore: [https://www.bioinformatics.babraham.ac.uk/projects/trim_galore/](https://www.bioinformatics.babraham.ac.uk/projects/trim_galore/)

samtools: [http://www.htslib.org/](http://www.htslib.org/)

BBTools: [https://jgi.doe.gov/data-and-tools/bbtools/](https://jgi.doe.gov/data-and-tools/bbtools/)

Biobakery: [https://github.com/biobakery/biobakery](https://github.com/biobakery/biobakery)

BWA: [https://github.com/lh3/bwa](https://github.com/lh3/bwa)
